translated_question: Find the nearest cafe to the dormitory.
english_question: Find the nearest cafe to the dormitory.
question: Find the nearest cafe to the dormitory.
gold_sql: SELECT target.geometry, target.name, target.amenity, ref.geometry AS ref_geom, ref.name AS ref_name FROM campus_places target JOIN campus_places ref ON 1=1 WHERE target.name IS NOT NULL AND target.name != 'nan' AND target.amenity ILIKE '%cafe%' AND ref.building ILIKE '%dormitory%' ORDER BY ST_Distance(target.geometry::geography, ref.geometry::geography) ASC LIMIT 1;
pred_sql: SELECT target.geometry, target.name, target.amenity, ref.geometry AS ref_geom, ref.name AS ref_name FROM campus_places target JOIN campus_places ref ON 1=1 WHERE target.name IS NOT NULL AND target.name != 'nan' AND target.amenity ILIKE '%cafe%' AND (ref.building ILIKE '%dormitory%' OR ref.building ILIKE '%dormitory%') ORDER BY ST_Distance(target.geometry::geography, ref.geometry::geography) ASC LIMIT 1;
raw_pred_sql:
SELECT target.geometry, target.name, target.amenity, ref.geometry AS ref_geom, ref.name AS ref_name
FROM campus_places target
JOIN campus_places ref ON 1=1
WHERE target.name IS NOT NULL AND target.name != 'nan'
  AND target.amenity ILIKE '%cafe%'
  AND (ref.name ILIKE '%dormitory%' OR ref.building ILIKE '%dormitory%')
ORDER BY ST_Distance(target.geometry::geography, ref.geometry::geography) ASC
LIMIT 1;

pred_sql: SELECT target.geometry, target.name, target.amenity, ref.geometry AS ref_geom, ref.name AS ref_name FROM campus_places target JOIN campus_places ref ON 1=1 WHERE target.name IS NOT NULL AND target.name != 'nan' AND target.amenity ILIKE '%cafe%' AND (ref.name ILIKE '%hostel%' OR ref.building ILIKE '%dormitory%') ORDER BY ST_Distance(target.geometry::geography, ref.geometry::geography) ASC LIMIT 1;
raw_pred_sql:
SELECT target.geometry, target.name, target.amenity, ref.geometry AS ref_geom, ref.name AS ref_name
FROM campus_places target
JOIN campus_places ref ON 1=1
WHERE target.name IS NOT NULL AND target.name != 'nan'
  AND target.amenity ILIKE '%cafe%'
  AND (ref.name ILIKE '%hostel%' OR ref.building ILIKE '%dormitory%')
ORDER BY ST_Distance(target.geometry::geography, ref.geometry::geography) ASC
LIMIT 1;
